reviews.review_description: Graphics are good but there need some changes is bat settings and more player should see the nowl where it going. Some time i never seen bowl. I hit somewhere and go somewhere. It is good game but need some improvement like IN cricket. Thank you

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you so much for your valuable feedback and for appreciating the design and graphics 🙌
We completely understand your concerns regarding bat settings and ball visibility. Our team is already working on improving these areas to make gameplay more accurate and realistic—especially shot direction and ball tracking.
These improvements will be included in upcoming updates very soon. Your feedback really helps us make the game better every day 💯
If you enjoy the improvements in the next update, we’d truly appreciate you updating your rating to 5⭐ 😊
Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: It offer an immersive batting experience with realistic shot timing and engaging gameplay. While not perfect, they’re a fun and interactive treat for cricket fans.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback and support! 🏏😊
We’re glad you’re enjoying the immersive batting experience and realistic shot timing in Cricket Strike VR. Our team is continuously working to improve the gameplay and make the experience even better for cricket fans around the world. More exciting updates are coming soon! 🔥🎮

reviews.review_description: Iam experiencing a critical UI bug in Cricket Strike that prevents me from calibrating physical bat attachments

developer_response.body:
Missing bat settings in Cricket Strike has been fully resolved in the latest version (v1.1).
We truly appreciate your patience and support 🙌

reviews.review_description: The best thing about this game is the realistic physics. Every shot feels natural, depending on timing and bat angle, just like real cricket. Cover drives and pull shots are super satisfying in VR. International and domestic tournaments make the game even more addictive. Totally worth downloading for cricket fans! 🏏🔥

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review! 🏏🔥
We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed the realistic physics and natural batting experience in Cricket Strike VR. Our goal was to make every shot feel close to real cricket, so feedback like this means a lot to the team. 😊

Glad you’re enjoying the tournaments and those satisfying cover drives & pull shots! More exciting updates, stadiums, and gameplay improvements are coming soon. Keep playing and keep smashing sixes in VR! 🎮🏆
